description: Generate a slope analysis map for the Colorado foothills site using the survey data in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\SurveyData\colorado_foothills.top'. Perform the analysis using percentage thresholds of 0-15%, 15-30%, 30-50%, and >50%. Create a slope report at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\slope_report.txt' including area and triangle counts for each zone along with the overall minimum, maximum, and average slope values. Save the project with the slope analysis visible to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\slope_analysis.top'.
